sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ναχώρ

- Transliteration: Nachor

- Phonetic: nakh-ore'

- Definition: Nahor = "snorting"

1. was the name of two persons in the family of Abraham, an ancestor of Christ

- Origin: of hebrew origin H5152

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H5152]; Nachor the grandfather of Abraham: - Nachor.
